manual.title: Connect to Elon Smart Water
manual.description: Enter the IP address of your Elon Smart Water controller.

scan.title: Scan Network
scan.description: Enter the network in CIDR notation to scan for Elon Smart Water devices (e.g. 192.168.1.0/24).

scan_results.title: Devices Found
scan_results.description: Found {count} Elon Smart Water device(s). Select a device to add.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the device. Check the IP address and port.
error.no_devices_found: No Elon Smart Water devices were found on the network.

init.title: Options
init.description: Configure Elon Smart Water integration settings.
